testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ Clicked Generate button ✓ Upgrade modal appeared ✓ Clicked "Continue with Free (1 generation)" ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)... ⏳ Please be patient - generation includes AI processing and redirect to review page ✅ CV generated successfully and redirected to review page 📍 Step 8: Testing review page... ✓ Current URL: https://www.mycvbuddy.com/review/d1392fb6-13c8-4ee5-a0ae-8efd07d81a85 ✓ Confirmed on review page ✓ Screenshot saved: review-page.png ⚠️ Download button not immediately visible - checking for other elements ✅ Review page loaded successfully 📍 Step 9: Verifying usage tracking... ✅ Usage tracking updated correctly
🎉 ======================================== 🎉 COMPLETE ONBOARDING FLOW TEST PASSED! 🎉 ======================================== ✅ Signup page shows usage limits ✅ Onboarding is mandatory (no skip) ✅ Dashboard shows correct empty state ✅ CV upload works correctly ✅ Dashboard updates after upload ✅ CV generation works end-to-end ✅ Usage tracking updates correctly ========================================

testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Verify image-based PDF rejection
Complete Onboarding Flow › Verify onboarding cannot be skipped
testcase.system-out: 📍 Testing mandatory onboarding... ✅ Onboarding is truly mandatory

testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[firefox] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')
56 | 57 | // Wait for onboarding modal to appear > 58 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }) | ^ 59 | 60 | // Verify 3-step process is shown 61 | await expect(page.locator('text=Upload → Generate → Download')).toBeVisible() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:58:64
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal...

testcase.failure:
[Mobile Chrome] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate Error: page.click: Target page, context or browser has been closed Call log: - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Continue with Free")') - locator resolved to - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable - retrying click action - waiting 100ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling -
…
intercepts pointer events - retrying click action - waiting 500ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - Upgrade to £2.99/month for Unlimited Generations intercepts pointer events 3 × retrying click action - waiting 500ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling -
…
intercepts pointer events - retrying click action - waiting 500ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable - retrying click action - waiting 500ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element was detached from the DOM, retrying - waiting for" https://www.mycvbuddy.com/review/0d143d34-7221-4071-b1cd-7845cd2ee461" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://www.mycvbuddy.com/review/0d143d34-7221-4071-b1cd-7845cd2ee461" 174 | 175 | // Click "Continue with Free (1 generation)" button to dismiss modal and start generation > 176 | await page.click('button:has-text("Continue with Free")') | ^ 177 | console.log(' ✓ Clicked "Continue with Free (1 generation)"') 178 | 179 | console.log(' ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)...') at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:176:16 attachment #1: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Chrome\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ Clicked Generate button ✓ Upgrade modal appeared
